Goal: The main glass entrance of the sports complex
Instruction: Walk straight along the brick-paved sidewalk, keeping the large, glowing purple circular sign on your left. Continue straight on the path under the trees, passing a tall pole with colorful lights on your left. Proceed straight across the crosswalk, passing a tall, dark rectangular sign board on your right. Enter the parking area and walk straight forward, keeping the parked cars on your right and the large, modern building with a sloping roofline and many glass windows on your left. Turn slightly left to approach the building's wide glass entrance. Stop in front of the glass double doors, near an orange traffic bollard. You have arrived at your destination.
